detaileddescription.para: This page provides detailed documentation for the truth-level particle classes used in the ssml_mc20 event.

sect1.title: Z-Boson
sect1.para: The zboson class represents a truth-level Z' boson.

listitem.para: zboson(): Initializes the particle type to "parton_Zprime" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the zboson particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the zboson particle's properties from the input data.

sect1.title: Top
sect1.para: The top class represents a truth-level top quark.

listitem.para: top(): Initializes the particle type to "parton_top" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the top particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the top particle's properties from the input data.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the top quark originates from a Z' boson.

sect1.title: Parton
sect1.para: The parton class represents a truth-level parton from the top quark decay.

listitem.para: parton(): Initializes the particle type to "parton" and defines the data leaves for the W decay products and the b-quark.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the parton particle.

void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the parton particle's properties from the input data. This method creates three parton objects per top quark, one for each of the W decay products and one for the b-quark.
top_index: The index of the parent top quark.
muon_index: The index of the matched muon, if any.
electron_index: The index of the matched electron, if any.
jet_index: The index of the matched jet, if any.
truthjet_index: The index of the matched truth jet, if any.
jets: A map of associated jet objects.
truthjets: A map of associated truthjet objects.
